Algorithms sourced from community-verified megaminx 2-look OLL/PLL reference sets, each verified by simulating it on a real megaminx state model before being added here.
Case-order weights are computed by exhaustively simulating which raw scrambles map to each case under the puzzle's rotational symmetry.
